revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Updated flag template name to avoid redirect.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{noflag|}}} | {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
 | IRE | EIR | Ireland = [[Ireland national rugby union team|{{{name|Ireland}}}]]
 | #default = [[{{getalias|{{{1|}}}}} national rugby union team|{{{name|{{getalias|{{{1|}}}}}}}}]]
}}| {{Country data {{{1}}}
| flag link/core
| variant = {{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| altlink = national rugby union team
| altvar = rugby union}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Ru]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Ru]]: Mass importing wikipedia

revision.text:

}}| {{Country data {{{1}}}
| flag link/core
| variant = {{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| altlink = national rugby union team
| altvar = rugby union}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
